action: UI Density Optimization & ID Auto-increment Fixes

changes.description: Enforced strict 1-line truncation and uniform height for all rows. Moved Price column next to Phone column.
Added Customer Code (Mã KH) field to Edit form. Locked the field to be read-only to prevent manual overrides.
Fixed Customer Code generation to find highest CUS code and auto-increment. Allowed backend to accept update requests but protected empty code deletion.
Updated Excel bulk import to auto-generate sequential CUS codes for rows with empty codes.
Added 'watch' flag to backend dev script to ensure hot-reloading for tsx.
